programme.title: Lost In Tasmania
programme.desc: Lost In Tasmania takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! We travel with local surfer Mikey Brennan as he and friends explore the secluded East Coast of Tasmania, the Tasman Peninsula and famed Shipstern Bluff where they find incredible scenery and epic waves.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep108: Behind-The-Scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting
programme.desc: Hot Water goes behind-the-scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep211: Nova Scotia, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores the history Nova Scotia with a to-the-centimetre replica of the “Hector”, checks out the oldest Yacht Club in the Americas and then goes Tidal Bore Rafting.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep107: Maui, Hawaii - USA
programme.desc: Adventures on Maui include ATV riding at Kahomo Ranch, watching Cirque Polynesia, sailing on Teralani, enjoying the Wailele Polynesian Luau and having fun at Mulligans/Willie K.

programme.title: Shark Encounters in the Deep
programme.desc: Hand-feeding and “flipping” Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas, diving with Great Whites near Mexico’s Guadalupe Island, learn how to put sharks into a relaxed state known as “Tonic Immobility”, enabling sharks to serve as camera operators.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep212: Orillia, Ontario – Canada: The Trent-Severn Waterway’s Best-Kept Secret
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull cruises into Orillia, Ontario, via the Trent-Severn Waterway, in time for their legendary pirate party and musket battle.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 4
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: Legendary professional snowboarder David Carrier-Porcheron reflects on Surf, Skate, and Snow culture, taking a closer look at what brings balance and happiness to people’s lives. Join us for this thoughtful and exhilarating ride with DCP.

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. Perspektiv tells the story of his return to snow after 13 months. Watch as he rediscovers his love of snowboarding, and why he can’t live without it.

programme.title: A New Beginning
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Mission Antarctic
programme.desc: ‘Mission Antarctic’ is a snowboarding expedition to the world’s end. Xavier de le Rue and Lucas DeBari set out from the Falklands on a 20-meter sailboat, navigating the Drake Passage to explore the Antarctic Peninsula. Awarded ‘Best Freeride Movie’ at the 2013 International Freeride Film Festival.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 1

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 2

Join us on a worldwide polo journey across all continents and discover this passionated sport that is linked in many countries to royalty.

programme.title: Jumping International Le Saut Hermès - Highlights Le Saut Hermès

They are about to try the unthinkable and write their name on equestrian history.Find out what happens in this competition with a height over 1.60m.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Expecting Change
programme.desc: God doesn’t just want to “fix” you, He wants to restore you. Right now, He’s transforming you to impact others. Expect more than a personal breakthrough; expect God to exceed your expectations and bless others through your life.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Keep It In Context
programme.desc: When you feel surrounded by pressure and fear, it’s easy to lose perspective. But what if God’s already provided the help you’ve been praying for? Keep it in context: the battle isn’t proof you’re losing, it’s evidence that you’re carrying something worth fighting for.

programme.title: You Can Change The End
programme.desc: You might not be able to change your past, but you can change what happens next. When life feels stuck or uncertain, remember this: the result belongs to God, but your response is still in your hands. You don’t have to control the outcome, just move forward and trust Him with what comes next.

programme.title: It Still Works

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena begins to open up to Marco Aurelio, and tells him that her ex-partner is a criminal, a murderer, who has threatened her with the life of her own son. Patricia does not mix her personal life with her work, so she will help the nurse get her son back. Pablo sees photos of Malena with Alfonso and orders to continue the follow-up, as they will be evidence that he will present to take the child from her. Lorena shows a photo of Guillermo to Marco Aurelio on his cell phone and he identifies him without a doubt as the hitman who tried to kill him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Omar suspects that Marco Aurelio has information that he does not reveal, but the clever lawyer does not give himself away. Omar and the Chief of Police rule out the possibility that people linked to a cartel are behind Marco Aurelio's assassination attempt. Claudio promises Lorena to personally deliver Ignacio to him if he ends his brother's life. Lorena holds the gun, looking for the strength to fire it.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Berenice claims Israel never loved her enough; the overwhelmed woman decrees that she hates her father for destroying her life.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: At nightfall, commissioner DAZA tries to arrest Clara Inés for identity theft, Nicolás defends him.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul makes it clear to Santiago that they are not celebrating, but when he sees that Adriana is accompanying the lawyer, he cannot control his jealousy.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César Román wishes happiness to the newlyweds, but Santiago - the discordant note - toasts to a happiness that lasts until Salvatore Perroni destroys them in court.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel tries to abuse Camila, a gloved hand hits him. Everyone blames Camila and she defends herself saying she did not see the murderer. Torrealba insists on interrogating her. Everyone: Octavia, Astrid, Max, Marcelina, Leandro, Gregorio and even Sebastián had motives to kill Ezequiel. Only Max is arrested, as the presumed perpetrator of the crime.

programme.title: ALEGRATE
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: ASI SON LAS COSAS (en vivo)
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max está demasiado dolido y no cree ya en ese amor, advirtiéndole que a partir de ahora se dedicará a odiarla, a olvidarla y que será ella la victima de su propia decisión. Ciego de ira y de dolor, grita a los presentes que se retiren pues no habrá boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.

programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
